g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does internet traffic pass through to the VPC?')
sendPrompt('What is the Internet Gateway responsible for?')
sendPrompt('What does the load balancer security group allow?')
sendPrompt('Why do all AZs need a load balancer?')
sendPrompt('What is a NAT Gateway elastic IP?')
sendPrompt('What does the app server security group allow?')
sendPrompt('How does the app server security group reference the load balancer SG?')
sendPrompt('What does the database security group allow?')
sendPrompt('Why does the database only accept traffic from the app server SG?')
sendPrompt('Can the internet ever reach the database directly?')
sendPrompt('Summarize all route tables in this VPC')
g.text: public-rt: 0.0.0.0/0 → IGW (shared by all 3 public subnets)
local route 10.0.0.0/16 → local (in all route tables, auto-added)
